The ultimate statement piece for your living space. This grand Rosewood Jhoola features a magnificent freestanding carved frame, elegant brass chains, and a plush red seat for unparalleled royal comfort.

Known across India as: Jhoola / Jula (Hindi), Oonjal / Unjal (Tamil), Uyyala (Telugu), Uyyale (Kannada), Hindola, Hichka (Gujarati), Jhulan, Jhulna, Dolna (Bengali), Dola.

Sought internationally as: Wooden Swing, Indoor Swing, Hanging Bench, Hanging Seat, Porch Swing, Suspended Seat.

Crafted with heavy-duty carved pillars and an intricate jali-work backrest, this massive Rosewood swing offers a majestic seating experience, bringing the grandeur of Indian palaces directly into your home.

name: Rosewood Inlay Pooja Mane | Chowki | Peeta | Prayer Platform (Collection)

Each piece is adorned with intricate traditional inlay designs, making it perfect as a sacred seating platform or deity base in your home temple.

name: Sri Rama Darbar (Rama, Lakshmana, Sita, Hanuman)
description: A complete Rama Darbar featuring Lord Rama, Goddess Sita, Lakshmana, and a kneeling Hanuman in pure devotion.

name: Lord Dattatreya | The Hindu Trinity Avatar
description: A stunning carving of Lord Dattatreya, the combined avatar of the Hindu Trinity: Brahma, Vishnu, and Maheshwara. The deity is depicted standing together in divine cosmic balance, accompanied by four sacred dogs and a cow at his feet.

name: Lord Shiva in Lotus Pose
description: An imposing statue of Lord Shiva seated in the lotus pose (Padmasana) atop a tiger skin pedestal, holding his trishul.

name: Seated Lord Ganesha on Lotus
description: A beautifully detailed Shivani teakwood carving of Lord Ganesha seated on a lotus pedestal, radiating peace and divine blessings.

name: Lord Rama with Bow
description: A magnificent carved Shivani teakwood statue of Lord Rama holding his divine bow, embodying righteousness and grace.

name: Nataraja (The Cosmic Dancer)
description: A dynamic and iconic portrayal of Lord Shiva as Nataraja performing the Anandatandava, surrounded by a ring of fire.

name: Vishwaroopa Darshan | Cosmic Manifestation
description: An elaborate, beautifully carved panel showcasing the Vishwaroopa Darshan. It displays the awe-inspiring cosmic manifestation of the Lord with multiple faces and arms, encompassing all deities and elements of the universe.

name: Lord Ayyappa Swami
description: A reverent statue of Lord Ayyappa seated in his classic yogic posture, intricately carved from seasoned Shivani teakwood.

name: Goddess Saraswathi with Veena
description: A graceful carving of Saraswathi, the goddess of knowledge and arts, elegantly playing her Veena.

name: Seated Lord Ganesha on Lotus
description: A masterful Shivani teakwood carving of Lord Ganesha seated on a fully blossomed lotus base, radiating divine blessings and prosperity.

name: Lord Subramanya (Kartikeya)
description: A powerful statue of the warrior god Subramanya, holding his Vel (spear) and accompanied by his divine peacock.

name: Serene Meditating Buddha
description: A peaceful depiction of Lord Buddha in deep meditation. The Shivani teakwood is polished to a smooth, warm finish, radiating tranquility.

name: Lord Venkateshwara (Balaji) Bust
description: A highly detailed bust of Lord Venkateshwara, capturing his serene facial expressions and intricate crown details.

name: Krishna Playing Flute with Cow
description: A quintessential depiction of the cowherd god, Lord Krishna, playing his flute while a devoted cow rests at his feet.

name: Seated Lord Ganesha
description: A welcoming statue of Lord Ganesha, the remover of obstacles. The Shivani teakwood grain beautifully highlights his divine ornaments.

name: Vishnu and Lakshmi on Garuda
description: A breathtaking and highly detailed carving of Lord Vishnu and Goddess Lakshmi flying on the shoulders of the mighty eagle Garuda.

name: Panchakshari | Shiva Parivar
description: A beautifully detailed Shivani teakwood Panchakshari carving of the Shiva Parivar, featuring Lord Shiva and Goddess Parvati with Ganesha and Kartikeya. This magnificent piece symbolizes universal harmony and divine familial bonds.

name: Standing Shivani Teakwood Krishna on Pedestal
description: An elegantly carved standing statue of Lord Krishna playing his divine flute. Expertly chiseled from premium Mysore Shivani teakwood and mounted on a polished dark wood hexagonal pedestal.

name: Lord Venkateshwara (Balaji)
description: A majestic standing statue of Lord Venkateshwara of Tirupati, complete with authentic adornments and the protective Prabhavali arch.

name: Sringeri Sharadhe (Goddess Saraswathi)
description: A divine carving of Sringeri Sharadhe (Goddess Saraswathi), the embodiment of supreme knowledge and arts, elegantly seated and exquisitely detailed in pure Shivani teakwood.

name: Vishwaroopa Darshan | Universal Form
description: A magnificent Shivani teakwood carving illustrating the spectacular Vishwaroopa Darshan. This intricate piece captures the cosmic, multi-headed, multi-armed universal form of the Lord, representing the entirety of creation.

name: Lord Patanjali
description: A beautifully carved Shivani teakwood idol of Lord Patanjali, the revered sage and compiler of the Yoga Sutras, depicted with a serpent canopy in a divine posture.

name: Baby Krishna Feeding Lord Ganesha
description: A beautifully heartwarming carving depicting Baby Krishna playfully feeding Lord Ganesha. Exquisitely detailed in premium Shivani teakwood.

name: Hand-Carved Shivani Teakwood Krishna Statue
description: A magnificent, intricately hand-carved Krishna statue made from premium aged Mysore Shivani teakwood. Featuring Lord Krishna playing his divine flute, surrounded by a breathtaking floral Prabhavali (archway) and delicate serpentine details.

name: Rosewood Floral Inlay Nesting Tables (Set of 4)
description: A space-saving set of four Rosewood nesting tables, elegantly crafted to fit together. Each tabletop showcases stunning floral inlay art, combining functionality with traditional aesthetics.
dimensions: Large: ~24x16 in | Medium: ~20x14 in | Small: ~16x12 in
materials: ["Solid Rosewood (Indian Sheesham)","Traditional Floral Inlay Work","High-Gloss Polish Finish"]

name: Rosewood Inlay Wall Art Panel (Court Scene)
description: A marvelous large rosewood panel depicting a court dancer performing in front of the King. Made of detailed multicolored wood inlays (jackwood, maple, teak) reflecting traditional Mysore art.

name: Sandalwood Bead Bracelets
description: Stretch bracelets made of premium Mysore sandalwood beads. Radiates a subtle woody aroma that acts as a natural calmative throughout the day.

name: Sandalwood Seated Lord Ganesha
description: A detailed idol of seated Ganesha holding divine emblems. Crafted meticulously from high-grade fragrant sandalwood and mounted on a rich octagonal base.

name: Sandalwood Japa Malas (Prayer Beads)
description: Authentic prayer rosary made of 108 fragrant sandalwood beads. Highly soothing to handle, bringing tranquility during meditation or daily prayers.

name: Sandalwood Baby Krishna Milking Cow Statue
description: A heartwarming and auspicious scene of Baby Krishna milking the cow, carved with extreme precision. Exquisitely captures the expressions and decorative ornaments of Krishna and the cow.

name: Sandalwood Krishna Statue (Venugopala)
description: A masterwork carving of Lord Krishna in his Venugopala form, standing in the classic Tribhanga posture playing his divine flute. Casts a sacred aroma that transforms any room.

name: Sandalwood Folding Hand Fan
description: A beautifully crafted folding hand fan made from pure Mysore sandalwood with silk binding thread.
